comment.body: yup seems like the 2 remaining gaps ( fair value and volume)  will get filled out today. Spy top was 689 and if it fills both gaps will end up in 674 territory giving another -2% day. I have no hopes of that -5% day materializing anytime soon. On the higher timeframes structure is still bullish and in terms of volume above VPOC on the daily timeframe. Big boys probably reloading for November and as Alma wrote in the free post, bullish for next 4-5 years.
